title: Calling exported DPI-C function from boost coroutine
body:
I'm not able to call an exported DPI-C function from a boost coroutine. Getting the following error
```
%Error: unknown:0: %Error: Testbench C called sv_func but no such DPI export function name exists in ANY model
```

## PFA test regress files
[dpi_coroutine.tar.gz](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/files/5604312/dpi_coroutine.tar.gz)
code_blocks: %Error: unknown:0: %Error: Testbench C called sv_func but no such DPI export function name exists in ANY model
